addCalendarEventParticipants.description:
Adds the given `participants` to the event with the given `event_id`.
It will also email the new participants notifying them of the event.

executableDef.description:
Adds the given `participants` to the event with the given `event_id`.
It will also email the new participants notifying them of the event.
executableDef.name: addCalendarEventParticipants

cancelCalendarEvent.description:
Cancels the event with the given `event_id`. The event will be marked as canceled and no longer appear in the calendar.
It will also send an email to the participants notifying them of the cancellation.

executableDef.description:
Cancels the event with the given `event_id`. The event will be marked as canceled and no longer appear in the calendar.
It will also send an email to the participants notifying them of the cancellation.
executableDef.name: cancelCalendarEvent

cancelCalendarEvent.name: cancelCalendarEvent

createCalendarEvent.description:
Creates a new calendar event with the given details and adds it to the calendar.
It also sends an email to the participants with the event details.

getCurrentDatetime.description: Return the current local datetime in YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM format.

getCurrentDay.description:
Returns the current day in ISO format, e.g. '2022-01-01'.
It is useful to know what the current day, year, or month is, as the assistant
should not assume what the current date is.

executableDef.description:
Returns the current day in ISO format, e.g. '2022-01-01'.
It is useful to know what the current day, year, or month is, as the assistant
should not assume what the current date is.
executableDef.name: getCurrentDay

getCurrentDay.name: getCurrentDay

Returns all the unread emails in the inbox. Each email has a sender, a subject, and a body.
The emails are marked as read after this function is called.

rescheduleCalendarEvent.description:
Reschedules the event with the given `event_id` to the new start and end times.
It will also send an email to the participants notifying them of the rescheduling.

only emails from that address are searched.

Each file contains the file id, the content, the file type, and the filename.

operation.semantics: Add participants to an existing calendar event.
Append content to an existing file.
Cancel a calendar event by id.
Create a calendar event and notify the participant list.
Delete an existing email by id.
Delete a cloud file by id.

get_day_calendar_events.semantics: Load all calendar events for one day.

get_email_by_id.semantics: Fetch one email by id with full body content.

get_file_by_id.semantics: Fetch one file by id with content.

list_files.semantics: List cloud files. Returned file_entry records include the content field when available, so later extract steps can read that resolved field directly by handle.

search_calendar_events.semantics: Search calendar events by query and date filter.

search_emails.semantics: Search email by query string and optional sender filter. Returned email_msg records already include the body field, so later extract steps can read that resolved field directly by handle.

search_emails_any_sender.semantics: Search email content without pinning the sender. Returned email_msg records already include the body field, so later extract steps can read that resolved field directly by handle.

search_files.semantics: Search cloud files by free-text query. Returned file_entry records include the content field when available, so later extract steps can read that resolved field directly by handle.

search_files_by_filename.semantics: Search cloud files by filename. Returned file_entry records include the content field when available, so later extract steps can read that resolved field directly by handle.

operation.semantics: Send an email message to one or more recipients.
Share a file with one recipient and a permission level.
